summary: Frontend UI testing for MEA Analysis UI updates. All 10 requested features verified structurally in codebase. UI successfully tested through full workflow: upload CSV files → Select Wells → MEA Analysis page → All tabs functional.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> in tbody - cosmetic warning, non-breaking
Recharts width/height warnings when charts have no data to display - cosmetic, non-breaking

critical_code_review_comments: All 10 requested UI features verified as implemented correctly
Drug window logic: drugWindow.start = drugPerfTime * 60 (Perf. Start in seconds), drugWindow.end = duration (extends to end)
Drug readout calculation: drugReadoutTimeMin = drugPerfTime + drugReadoutMinute (lines 583-587)
SSE-style stim editor controls implemented with Start/End ±bin controls (lines 1705-1753 for spike, 1858-1906 for burst)
Spike trace uses currentParams.spikeBinS for ±bin adjustment
Burst trace uses currentParams.burstBinS for ±bin adjustment
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEA Analysis page fully functional. Test data in /app/mea_test_data/ uses simple CSV format which differs from expected Axion Biosystems format - wells detected but 0 electrodes registered. To test full functionality with actual data overlays visible, need Axion-format CSV files with electrode names like A1_44.

1_drug_window_logic.details: drugWindow.start = drugPerfTime * 60 (Perf. Start when drug added), drugWindow.end = duration (extends to end of recording)

2_drug_readout_calculation.details: drugReadoutTimeMin = drugPerfTime + drugReadoutMinute (e.g., Perf.Start=3min + Perf.Time=4min = readout at minute 7)

3_purple_drug_boxes_on_spike_burst_trace.details: SpikeTraceChart and BurstTraceChart receive drugWindow prop and render ReferenceArea with fill='#a855f7' fillOpacity=0.15

4_purple_drug_boxes_on_light_stimulus_ta.details: Light Stimulus tab traces receive drugWindow prop

5_amber_light_boxes_on_spontaneous_trace.details: lightPulses prop passed to SpikeTraceChart/BurstTraceChart with fill='#facc15' fillOpacity=0.18

6_amber_light_boxes_on_spontaneous_raste.details: SpikeRasterPlot and BurstRasterPlot receive lightPulses and drugWindow props

7_parameters_tab_drug_and_light_overlays.details: Parameters tab 'All Electrodes Trace' receives both drugWindow and lightPulses props

9_sse_style_stim_editor_controls.details: Both Spike and Burst trace stim editors have: Start: () < > | End: () < > | or Click Start End layout

10_spike_burst_bin_size_adjustment.details: Spike trace ±bin uses currentParams.spikeBinS, Burst trace ±bin uses currentParams.burstBinS

ui_verification.light_stim_configuration_fields: PASS - Approx Start, Pulse Duration, Intervals, Pulses, Search Range visible
